content: Overlay label/badge readability slice completed: user observed ordinary edge labels and auth overlay badges overlapping, with the auth badge background too narrow for its icon/text. Normal edge labels are now reserved before overlay edge badges are placed, so auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/validation badges avoid ordinary labels. Edge badge width now accounts for icon column, text width, and right padding. Updated docs/aof/OVERLAY-LABEL-BADGE-QIF-CHECK-2026-07-12.md. Verification: npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts (56 passing); npx tsc --noEmit; npm test (235 passing); npm run build; in-app browser smoke on http://127.0.0.1:5173/ sample release-checkout found 0 edge-label/badge overlaps and visible JWT badges with about 15px right padding. Existing untracked reports/ remains untouched.
